name: Basic Oatburger
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Add 4 1/2 cups rolled oats and stir gently.
4. Cook for about five minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Form patties using an oiled mason jar lid.
7. Place on an oiled cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, turning every 15 minutes.
9. Serve with ketchup or gravy. Makes about 20-25 medium sized burgers.
